_instructions: Fill this in once. Every platform writer skill reads this file before generating content. This is the foundation of voice consistency across all formats.

voice.one_liner: [ONE SENTENCE — what you do and who you do it for]
voice.primary_content_goal: [brand awareness / lead generation / sales / authority building / community]
voice.formality_level: [e.g. 'conversational and strategic — plain language with precise vocabulary' OR 'casual and warm' OR 'direct and operator-facing']
voice.pov: [DESCRIBE YOUR POINT OF VIEW — e.g. 'strong first-person practitioner (I tested, I built, a client I worked with) blended with direct audience address to create immediate relevance' OR 'mentor voice — seen it all, cutting through the noise']
voice.humor: [DESCRIBE HUMOR STYLE — e.g. 'dry and self-aware, occasional deadpan observation, never motivational' OR 'none — strictly professional' OR 'light and relatable, uses analogies the audience recognises']
voice.signature_pov: [ONE PARAGRAPH — the core belief that shapes all content. The thing you believe that most people in your space don't.]

creators_admired.name: [CREATOR 1 NAME]
creators_admired.what_you_like: [WHAT SPECIFICALLY you like about their style]

sounds_like_me: [EXAMPLE 1 — paste a real piece of your content that sounds like you at your best]
does_not_sound_like_me: [EXAMPLE — paste something that sounds wrong: too AI, too corporate, too generic]
